items.text:
🔍 *ENRICH REVIEW*  \[✨ ENRICHED\]

*Name:* Charleville Castle
*Country:* ireland
*Region:* the heartlands
*County:* County Offaly
*Type:* castle
*Period:* 19th century
*Coords:* 53.2604, -7.5279
*Wikipedia:* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Charleville_Castle
*Maps:* https://www.google.com/maps/search/Charleville%20Castle/@53.2736,-7.7294,15z
*Main Image:* https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/9f/Charleville_Castle.png/330px-Charleville_Castle.png
*Gallery:* 0 images
*Image Source:* wikipedia
*Has Wikipedia:* yes
*Has Google Places:* unknown
*Enrich Notes:* add source - https://www.charlevillecastle.ie/

*Description:*
Charleville Castle is a Gothic-style castle located in County Offaly, Ireland, bordering the town of Tullamore, near the River Clodiagh. It is considered one of the finest of its type in the country.

_Listing 2 of 53_
